action_items.action: REVIEW 3 NEW IN PRODUCT (Friday batch) — GDCU-8955 Cool Tones Phase 2 (Harden, moved from QA 08/05 11:55), GDCU-8936 Ace Navigation Redesign with Global Nav Bar (Carlos, new to In Product 08/05 11:54), GDCU-8847 VIP Rev Share Operator List UK (Nebojsa, moved from QA 08/05 11:48). All three landed late Friday. Review and approve or provide feedback today — the team will be starting Monday expecting responses.

WC PREDICTOR DESIGN — TARGET IS TOMORROW (12/05). GDCU-8935 (Miguel Migneco, Backlog, updated 08/05 11:47). Full end-to-end Figma design for the World Cup 2026 free-to-play predictor game — entry flow, group stage predictions (48 matches), knockout bracket, outrights, leaderboard, mobile-first at 3 breakpoints. £10k prize pool. Check with Miguel first thing: has design started? On track for tomorrow? If not, assess impact on dev handoff and the 11 June hard deadline.

GROUP BETS — CONFIRM THURSDAY TARGET MET. Thursday 07/05 was the agreed design target (Miguel, per Chloe commitment 05/05). No Slack confirmation seen over the weekend. Check with Miguel: is design done? If yes → schedule KO call with Chloe and dev team immediately (11 June hard deadline). If not → assess timeline impact and update Chloe today before tomorrow's GDCC agenda meeting.

REVIEW GDCU-8874 Page Bloat SEO (HIGH, Harden) — 4+ days in Product review (updated 07/05 14:30). Four independent fixes: (1) CookieYes lazy render −432 KB/−18,900 DOM nodes; (2) SSR operator list −400 to −1,212 KB; (3) VWO async −379 KB; (4) inline scripts cleanup. Combined savings on /uk/online-casinos: 3,789 KB → ~1,600 KB (−58%). Stakeholders: Chloe Christie, Joshua Smith, Gabriel Cornoiu, Dan Smullen. Review and approve implementation priority order.

GDCU-8907 BETTING TIPS HUB — Still Blocked/In QA (last updated 06/05 17:00) despite Sanja saying 'This should be fixed now' on 07/05 after Gabriel confirmed European leagues return. Ticket stale 5 days. Confirm with Sanja: fix deployed and QA can proceed? If yes, update ticket status immediately. Hot ticket — Butlin, Dan Smullen, Gabriel all stakeholders. Butlin is in tomorrow's GDCC meeting.

JESSICA BACK FROM LEAVE — She was off Friday 08/05. (1) GDCU-8948 Prize Boxes 5th Box — 4 days in Product review, review and approve so Jessica can progress. (2) GDCU-8906 NL Claude Generated Tables (To Do, assigned to Jessica) — agree start date. Also: she asked Friday for feedback on 'the design she did for Colin and Dean' — identify what this refers to and respond today.

REVIEW GDCU-8806 Age Gate (Carlos Blauth, In Product) — 5 days in product review (updated 06/05 15:18). Compliance requirement for Apple App Store (Guideline 5.3) and Google Play. Age confirmation on first launch, local preference storage, blocks under-18s, responsible gambling disclaimers. Apple reviewers specifically look for this — gate item before store submission. Approve or provide feedback today.

GDCU-8810 DEVELOPER ACCOUNTS STILL BLOCKED — Apple/Google org-level accounts (Harden, Blocked/In Progress, Day 5, last updated 06/05). First action: contact RotoWire team to check if GDC Group org accounts already exist — could shortcut timeline from 6–8 weeks to 1–2 weeks. App submission pipeline (GDCU-8806, GDCU-8936) is gated on this.

VIC DADSON — Day ~20 of no Slack activity (last seen 21/04). Sick leave return expected ~05/05. Still no messages. Reach out directly: wellbeing check-in first, then re-establish data engineering plan. If still absent, flag to Colin Brannigan and agree cover plan.

WC COSMO SPINS RESKIN — GDCU-8392 (Ciara Carroll, Backlog, 🔥, still Backlog as of 07/05). Ciara is now actively on GDCU-8619 (Operator List Redesign, In Progress, HIGH). Hard deadline 11 June. Agree sprint sequencing with Ciara today: when does she expect to deliver GDCU-8619 so she can start GDCU-8392? Full reskin scope: WC-themed symbols, animations, 3 audio tracks, background, frames, countdown clock, menu animation, banners.

INTERVIEW COORDINATION — Confirm Wednesday 14/05 12–3pm interview slot with Liam Caffrey and Gabriel. Liam noted Mike's calendar appears full in that window on Friday. Check calendar and reply to Liam's DM today to confirm.

DUPLICATE PAYMENT METHODS — Icelandic EN brand pages showing duplicate payment methods (gambling.com/is/en/spinlander). Chloe raised in #gdc-pod on Friday, asked Sanja to create a ticket. Verify Sanja raised the ticket and that it is assigned and prioritised.
